title: Rowdy Baby Lyrics

seo.title: Rowdy Baby Lyrics
seo.description: Full Rowdy Baby songs lyrics, sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Dhanush, Music: Yuvan, Singer(s): Dhanush, Dhee. ஹே என் கோலி சோடாவே என் கறி  குழம்ப...
seo.keywords: Dhanush, Yuvan, Dhanush, Dhee, Rowdy Baby full lyrics,  songs lyrics, Rowdy Baby lyrics snippets, Rowdy Baby WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Rowdy Baby lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Rowdy Baby?

The song Rowdy Baby celebrates youthful love and the carefree spirit of dancing, filled with playful lyrics and a catchy tune.

In which movie does Rowdy Baby appear?

Rowdy Baby is featured in the movie Maari 2, which is a sequel to the original Maari.

Who are the singers of Rowdy Baby?

The song is sung by Dhanush and Dhee, both of whom bring a unique energy to the track.

Who composed the music for Rowdy Baby?

The music for Rowdy Baby was composed by the talented Yuvan Shankar Raja, known for his catchy and vibrant compositions.

When was Rowdy Baby released?

Rowdy Baby was released on December 2, 2018.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Rowdy Baby, the lively beats and catchy lyrics encapsulate the essence of youthful exuberance and romance. The song unfolds in a playful context within the movie Maari 2, where the characters express their carefree love through dance and fun. With its upbeat tempo, it evokes feelings of joy and celebration, making it a perfect anthem for parties. The collaboration between Dhanush and Dhee adds a unique charm, ensuring that listeners can't help but groove along.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Rowdy Baby is a vibrant and energetic track that showcases the electrifying collaboration between Dhanush and Dhee. With Yuvan Shankar Raja's infectious beats, this song is sure to get you on your feet. Dive into the fun and lively vibe that makes this track a must-listen!
stanzaMeanings: Hey, my dear, my little puppy, take me, take me.
Hey, my charm is heavy, love me, talk to me.
My dear friend, if you keep your heart open, we can connect, my heart is racing.
My dear queen, come into my dreams, are we going to set the world on fire together?
Let's go to the beach, we'll dance together, you are my rowdy baby.
You're only my girlfriend. I'll give you a kiss. We'll start a new trend, baby.
Let's go, dance, rowdy baby, girlfriend, new trend, baby. Rowdy baby...
Because of you, my hormones are out of balance... damaged...
Hey, my fish... this is a new look for you...
One plus one is two, you plus me is three.
Oh, brave queen, my Krishna, I'll buy you a pony, come ride it with me.
You are my lucky charm, I am half of you, we are a great pair.
Rowdy baby, oh rowdy baby, rowdy baby... rowdy baby.
Hey, my dear, my little puppy, take me, take me.
Hey, my charm is heavy, love me, talk to me.
My dear friend, if you keep your heart open, we can connect, my heart is racing.
My dear queen, come into my dreams, are we going to set the world on fire together?
Let's go to the beach, we'll dance together, you are my rowdy baby.
You're only my girlfriend. I'll give you a kiss. We'll start a new trend, baby.
Rowdy baby, rowdy baby, rowdy baby, rowdy baby.
